about_intro.title: Introduction
about_intro.content:
I'm a self-taught Full-Stack Developer from Indonesia who is passionate about building modern web applications, APIs, and digital products that solve real-world problems. My journey into technology began with curiosity and a desire to understand how software shapes the way people communicate, work, and create value. Over the years, I have developed experience across both frontend and backend development, working with modern technologies to create scalable, maintainable, and user-focused solutions. I enjoy transforming ideas into functional products by combining clean architecture, thoughtful user experiences, and practical engineering principles.

Beyond software development, I have a strong interest in artificial intelligence, entrepreneurship, digital business, and emerging technologies. I enjoy exploring innovative ideas, validating business opportunities, and building products that have the potential to create meaningful impact. Continuous learning is an important part of my journey, and I am always seeking new challenges that help me grow both technically and professionally. Whether it's developing web platforms, designing APIs, experimenting with AI-powered solutions, or launching new ventures, I am driven by the excitement of turning ambitious concepts into reality.

about_fun_fact.title: Fun Facts
about_fun_fact.empty_label: Click the dice to reveal a fact.

items.1: My favorite number is 4 because it represents stability, structure, and strong foundations.
items.2: I learned software development through self-study, documentation, experimentation, and real-world projects.
items.3: I enjoy building products more than consuming tutorials.
items.4: I can spend hours tracking down and fixing a single bug until I understand its root cause.
items.5: Photography and videography allow me to express creativity beyond technology.
items.6: I started building products before getting my first client.
items.7: I am interested in the intersection of technology, business, artificial intelligence, and automation.
items.8: I enjoy exploring startup ideas and turning them into testable prototypes.
items.9: I believe official documentation is the best learning resource for developers.
items.10: I prefer building simple, reliable, and maintainable solutions.
